deploy.startCommand: /bin/sh -c 'TINI=$(command -v tini || echo /usr/bin/tini); if [ ! -x "$TINI" ]; then echo "WARN: tini not found, running without a reaping init (zombie risk on scheduler)" >&2; TINI=; fi; BOOT="php artisan migrate --force && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache"; case "${SERVICE_ROLE:-web}" in web) APP="php -d max_execution_time=0 -d memory_limit=512M artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT" ;; worker) APP="php -d max_execution_time=0 -d memory_limit=512M artisan queue:work --queue=publishing,drafting,metrics,autopilot,default --tries=1 --timeout=330 --sleep=3 --memory=384 --max-time=3600" ;; scheduler) APP="php artisan schedule:work" ;; *) echo "Unknown SERVICE_ROLE: $SERVICE_ROLE" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; eval "$BOOT" || exit 1; if [ -n "$TINI" ]; then exec "$TINI" -s -- sh -c "exec $APP"; else exec sh -c "exec $APP"; fi'
